leadText: The Marill Ball (Japanese: マリルボール Maril Ball) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Marill Ball can be brought out during a picnic to be kicked around by the player and their party Pokémon.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A Marill-themed ball. It's soft and springy. Make sure you haven't mistaken a real Marill for this ball before throwing.

sections.title: In the core series games
